0.content:
# GitHub Pages & RUM

Documentation engagement across [dynatrace-wwse.github.io](https://dynatrace-wwse.github.io) — page views, sessions, and geographic reach.

[← Instantiations](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/48b50182-c097-47a3-b864-1b72eb234946) · [← Overview](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/27ea9191-533f-4911-89ae-ef96fe63c7ef)

1.title: Page Views
1.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Unique Sessions
2.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

3.title: Countries
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(geo.country.name)
| summarize countries = countDistinct(geo.country.name)

4.title: Documentation Sites
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(dt.rum.application.id)
| summarize sites = countDistinct(dt.rum.application.id)

5.title: Page Views Over Time
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| makeTimeseries views = count(), interval: 1d

6.title: Most Viewed Pages
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(page)
| summarize views = count(), by: { page, dt.rum.application.id }
| sort views desc
| limit 20

7.title: Top Documentation Pages
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(page)
| summarize views = count(), by: { page }
| sort views desc
| limit 15

8.title: Page Views by Country
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(geo.country.name)
| summarize views = count(), by: { geo.country.name }
| sort views desc
| limit 15

9.title: Country Reach
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| filter isNotNull(geo.country.name)
| fieldsAdd countryCode = coalesce(geo.country.isoCode, if(geo.country.name == "United States", "US", else: if(geo.country.name == "United Kingdom", "GB", else: if(contains(geo.country.name, "Netherlands"), "NL", else: if(geo.country.name == "Australia", "AU", else: if(geo.country.name == "New Zealand", "NZ", else: if(geo.country.name == "Singapore", "SG", else: if(geo.country.name == "Spain", "ES", else: if(geo.country.name == "Germany", "DE", else: if(geo.country.name == "France", "FR", else: if(geo.country.name == "India", "IN", else: if(geo.country.name == "Japan", "JP", else: if(geo.country.name == "Brazil", "BR", else: if(geo.country.name == "Canada", "CA", else: "XX")))))))))))))
| summarize count = count(), by: { countryCode }
| fields countryCode, count

10.title: RUM Apps — Page Views & Performance
10.query:
fetch user.events
| summarize views = count(), avgDuration = avg(duration), by: { dt.rum.application.id }
| lookup [data
  record(id = "0300531523b332e3", name = "demo-mcp-unguard"),
  record(id = "1551d00ab46737d4", name = "log-ingest-101"),
  record(id = "50e6d81a11783485", name = "demo-nvidia-agent"),
  record(id = "59b0b1c4d53a32f5", name = "browser-dem-biz"),
  record(id = "640a44336fc29980", name = "bug-busters"),
  record(id = "6c332b985a9890d6", name = "live-debugger"),
  record(id = "6f303dd9fa111f82", name = "dql-fundamentals"),
  record(id = "7c50bce5c0cc890f", name = "codespaces-template"),
  record(id = "8d3a8e2f85a94d58", name = "k8s-otel-openpipeline"),
  record(id = "a8e749099685c188", name = "workflow-essentials"),
  record(id = "ad7b68fd2b9d9448", name = "k8s-opentelemetry"),
  record(id = "d6a688035595a70d", name = "log-analytics-ws"),
  record(id = "e1da735db6894c6c", name = "remote-environment"),
  record(id = "e4d90cc9ebfea2e7", name = "gen-ai-llm"),
  record(id = "e6d3d89f79f14be8", name = "wwse.github.io"),
  record(id = "ec2456210a428096", name = "dql-301"),
  record(id = "f0e597e550cc03f6", name = "business-obs"),
  record(id = "ff78563295ff1e42", name = "codespaces-framework")],
  sourceField: dt.rum.application.id, lookupField: id, prefix: "app."
| fieldsAdd appName = coalesce(app.name, dt.rum.application.id)
| fields appName, views, avgDuration
| sort views desc
| limit 20

11.title: Views Over Time by Site
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "dynatrace-wwse.github.io"
| makeTimeseries views = count(), by: { dt.rum.application.id }, interval: 1d
